name: Freezer Pickles
recipeIngredient: 1 head Cauliflower, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all ingredients except for sugar and vinegar; let stand overnight.
2. Drain the mixture.
3. Boil the sugar and vinegar separately until ready to use.
4. Cool the boiled sugar and vinegar mixture.
5. Pour the cooled sugar and vinegar over the vegetables.
6. Freeze the prepared mix in plastic containers.
7. Thaw at room temperature before using.
These pickles are ready to use immediately. Makes about 8 quarts.
Origin: Homestyle, Canadian Classics
Shared by: Sharon Stevens
